variants: Yin Fen is an accomplished specialist in Landscape Ecology who has authored the 'Harmonic Tether Unit,' which is widely recognized in her field. Her research efforts have been primarily supported by the Heathen Reel Grants, allowing her to undertake innovative ecological projects. Apart from her scientific endeavors, Yin is a member of the Kindleblossom Origami Society, where she fuses her appreciation for nature with the delicate art of origami. Her doctoral advisor, Minh Chau Doan, has been a pivotal figure in her academic journey, nurturing her development as a researcher.

Throughout her academic path, she has been guided by her mentor, Minh Chau Doan, who has profoundly influenced her scholarly pursuits.
